title: Download from logger
subtitle: Choose your logger to start a download.
trademarks: MyChron is a trademark of AiM Tech S.r.l. and Alfano is a trademark of Alfano S.A. LapWing is independent and not affiliated with or endorsed by them; all product names, logos, and brands are the property of their respective owners.
fledglingUnsupported: Web Bluetooth isn't supported here — use Chrome, Edge or Opera on desktop.

mychron.webBody: MyChron loggers transfer over Wi-Fi, which web browsers can't access directly. A dedicated native app to download from MyChron is in active development and is slated to launch around July 2026.

flow.wifiSelecting: Waiting for you to pick your MyChron in the Wi-Fi list…
flow.wifiHint: Approve the connection in the system dialog to continue.
flow.instructions: Tap a session to download and load it:
flow.savedHint: — the file was saved and can be found in Browse Files.

flow.noDevices: No loggers found. Make sure yours is powered on, Bluetooth is enabled, then rescan.
flow.instructions: Tap a session to download and load it:
flow.savedHint: — the file was saved and can be found in Browse Files.

alfano.title: Native app required
alfano.body: Alfano uses Bluetooth serial, which web browsers can't access in-browser — it will also require the native app. A dedicated native app to download from Alfano is in development.

flow.noDevices: No Alfano loggers found. Make sure yours is powered on, Bluetooth is enabled, then rescan.
flow.instructions: Tap a session to download and load it:
flow.savedHint: — the file was saved and can be found in Browse Files.
